title_en: Smart Baby Bed Based on STM32
name: 梁炘
abstract_zh_1: 针对家庭婴儿看护中环境温湿度异常、体温异常和尿床提醒不及时的问题，本文结合实际项目资料，设计并实现了一种基于STM32的智能婴儿床监护系统。系统以STM32F103C8T6核心板为控制核心，采用DHT11采集婴儿床周围温湿度，采用MLX90614完成非接触式红外测温，采用液体湿度检测模块判断尿床状态，并通过OLED屏、三路继电器、蜂鸣器、报警灯和ESP8266 WiFi模块完成本地显示、执行控制、声光报警和远程交互。
abstract_zh_2: 硬件部分依据项目原理图、PCB图和BOM清单进行整理，明确了温湿度、体温、尿床检测、按键、OLED、继电器、蜂鸣器、报警灯、ESP8266等模块的连接关系。软件部分依据实际源码进行分析，主循环依次完成按键处理、数据采集、自动/手动控制、报警处理、上传调度和显示刷新，云端通过阿里云物联网平台完成属性上报和命令下发。实物测试表明，系统能够完成温湿度、体温和尿床状态监测，并能根据阈值控制加热、散热和加湿执行模块，基本满足家庭场景下低成本婴儿床监护需求。
keywords_zh: STM32；智能婴儿床；DHT11；MLX90614；ESP8266；阿里云物联网
abstract_en_1: Aiming at delayed warning of environmental abnormality, body temperature abnormality and bed-wetting in family infant care, this thesis designs and implements an intelligent baby bed monitoring system based on STM32 according to the actual project materials. The system uses an STM32F103C8T6 core board as the controller. DHT11 is used to acquire ambient temperature and humidity, MLX90614 is used for non-contact infrared temperature measurement, and a liquid humidity detection module is used to detect bed-wetting. OLED display, three relay outputs, buzzer, alarm LED and ESP8266 WiFi module are integrated to realize local display, actuator control, sound-light alarm and remote interaction.
abstract_en_2: The hardware design is analyzed according to the schematic, PCB and BOM of the project, and the connections of sensors, keys, OLED, relays, buzzer, alarm LED and ESP8266 are clarified. The software design is analyzed according to the actual source code. The main loop completes key processing, data acquisition, automatic/manual control, alarm processing, report scheduling and display refresh. The cloud terminal is connected through Aliyun IoT platform for property uploading and command receiving. Test results show that the system can monitor temperature, humidity, body temperature and bed-wetting status, and can control heating, cooling and humidifying modules according to thresholds, meeting the basic requirements of low-cost family infant care.
keywords_en: STM32; intelligent baby bed; DHT11; MLX90614; ESP8266; Aliyun IoT
acknowledgement: 本论文的完成离不开指导教师和同学们的帮助。在课题设计和论文整理过程中，指导教师对系统方案、硬件连接、程序调试和论文结构提出了指导意见；同学们在资料整理、实物拍摄和模块测试方面给予了支持。通过本次毕业设计，我对STM32嵌入式开发、传感器采集、继电器控制和物联网通信有了更加系统的认识，也提高了将实际项目资料转化为规范论文内容的能力。谨向所有给予帮助的人表示感谢。
appendix: 附录列出主程序核心调度逻辑。完整程序以项目提供的Keil工程为准，主要文件包括main.c、gpio.c、key.c、dht11.c、mlx90614.c、oled.c、esp8266.c、aliyun.c和MqttKit.c。主循环初始化GPIO、按键、OLED、串口、定时器、MLX90614、DHT11、ESP8266和阿里云连接后，周期执行Key_function、Monitor_function、Manage_function、Alarm_Function、Report_Task和Display_function，从而形成采集、判断、控制、报警、上报和显示的闭环。
toc_entries: 2.3 元器件与项目资料分析
5.2 传感器、执行器与云端测试
